description: CompositionBlue and white plaid shirt with black accents made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full length  buttoned placket, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hemlineWash care  Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam ironThis blue and white plaid shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The blue and white combo gives off a fresh vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look.Size and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
